command_rows.success_disposition_hint: READY or ACCEPTED disposition; fail closed otherwise

command_rows.purpose: wet observation intake accepts or rejects endpoint rows
command_rows.success_disposition_hint: READY or ACCEPTED disposition; fail closed otherwise

command_rows.purpose: combines detector and wet accepted-evidence branches

command_rows.purpose: activates route-score candidates only after real accepted evidence

formula_rows.next_required_action: complete accepted detector and wet evidence inputs, then rerun the command chain

input_rows.required_action: populate detector blank transfer input rows with accepted hashes, controls, sample counts, uncertainty model, and pre-registered rule status
populate all wet endpoint observation rows with source hashes, required fields, controls, replicate counts, uncertainty intervals, and pre-registration status where required
populate detection probability value rows with estimates, confidence intervals, positive-control counts, threshold policy, controls, uncertainty model, source hash, and pre-registration status
populate yield and wet-pass value rows with estimates, confidence intervals, wet trial counts, model id, controls, uncertainty model, source hash, and pre-registration status
